name: VeloContentArchiveItem
description: Permanent archive of all user-generated VELO outputs.

owner_user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this content.

owner_email.description: Email of the user who owns this content.

title.description: Title or headline of the content.

content_type.description: Type: job_application, email, social_post, product_description, sales_copy, report, plan, template, digital_product, research_summary, graphic, workflow_output, autopilot_deliverable, file, other.

source_department.description: Source department like Freelance Station, Trading Hub, etc.

source_module.description: Specific module ID that generated the content.

workflow_name.description: Name of the workflow that produced this content.

summary.description: A short summary of the content.

file_url.description: URL to a generated file, if applicable.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the generated file.

related_mission_id.description: ID of the mission that generated this content.

related_record_id.description: ID of a related record (e.g. Job ID).

reuse_count.description: Number of times this content has been reused.
